title: CLI Todo with Flags
description: File-backed todo list using the standard `flag` package and JSON persistence.

snippets.label: main.go
snippets.code:
package main

import "flag"

func main() {
	list := flag.Bool("list", false, "list todos")
	add := flag.String("add", "", "add todo")
	flag.Parse()
	_ = list; _ = add
}

main.go
snippets.code:
package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"
)

func main() {
	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer stop()
	srv := newServer()
	run(srv)
	<-ctx.Done()
	log.Println("shutting down")
	shutdown, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	_ = srv.Shutdown(shutdown)
}
